message:
fix(algorithms): simplify minimum_branching weight transformation, sort branching edges deterministically, refactor arborescence iterator partition logic

- Replace the complex max+1+(max-min)-w weight transformation in
  minimum_branching with simple negation (-w), which produces the same
  optimal structure with less numerical sensitivity
- Add sort_branching_edges() calls after Edmonds' key resolution in
  maximum_branching, minimum_branching, and both spanning arborescence
  functions — ensures deterministic edge ordering in results regardless
  of internal HashMap iteration order
- Refactor arborescence_iterator_ordered_with_partition: replace the
  recursive reaches_root/would_create_cycle helpers and manual
  enumeration+seen-set dedup with partition-dict-based enumeration using
  the shared compute_partition_mst infrastructure, simplifying ~120 lines
  of manual tree construction into the existing partition framework
- Update Python FFI bindings to match refactored API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
